canonical_name: Signal Transducer and Activator of Transcription 1
step_rationale: MI inflammatory pathway and severity regulator; STAT1 is a key inflammatory transcription factor.
mechanism: A transcription factor regulating inflammatory and injury responses in acute MI, modulating plaque inflammation and cardiomyocyte damage.

references.title: Integrative transcriptomic analysis identifies an oxidative stress-associated diagnostic signature for myocardial infarction.
Transcriptomic Profiling Unravels Novel Deregulated Gene Signatures Associated with Acute Myocardial Infarction: A Bioinformatics Approach.
